title: Mexican Grilled Trout
description: A flavorful and healthy Mexican-inspired dish featuring grilled trout as the main ingredient. This recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Rinse the trout under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, olive oil, cumin, chili powder, and garlic powder.
Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Brush the trout with the lime juice mixture and place on the grill.
Grill the trout for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the trout hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Serve with your favorite Mexican sides, such as rice, beans, or tortillas.
